summary: नेपाली सेनाको सैन्य पदको ललखित परीक्षाको परीक्षा भवन कायम गररएको सूचना
description: The Nepal Army has announced the examination schedule for the military position. The exam will be held on 2082 Chaitra 21 at 11:00 AM and will last for 2 hours and 30 minutes. The exam will be conducted at the designated exam center, and candidates are required to bring their admit card and a valid ID. The exam will consist of multiple-choice questions, and candidates are advised to arrive at the exam center at least 2 hours prior to the exam start time.

post: Nepal Engineering Service, Mechanical Group, Non-Gazetted, First Class, Technical Posts
description: The Public Service Commission of Nepal has cancelled the examination for the posts of Nepal Engineering Service, Mechanical Group, due to the candidates not meeting the minimum qualification marks. The examination was held on 2078-07-08 at the Kathmandu office. The decision to cancel the examination was made based on the commission's judgment. This notice is published to inform all concerned parties.

The Public Service Commission has announced changes to the examination centers for the upcoming engineer exams. The exams will be held on 2078-11-13 and 2078-11-20. The new examination centers have been assigned to the candidates. The commission has also notified that the examination schedule and other details remain the same.

The Public Service Commission of Nepal has announced the schedule for the interview of candidates who have been selected for the post of Naib Subba or equivalent. The interview will be held on various dates and times, and candidates are required to bring certain documents with them. The commission has also provided a list of selected candidates and their respective interview schedules.
